description: Scoring algorithm for peptide COA authenticity verification. Produces a 0–100 final score with band labels and action recommendations.

step_by_step: 1. For each rule, assign a result: PASS=1, FAIL=0, NOT_APPLICABLE (excluded from calculation)
2. Apply severity multiplier to each rule weight: critical × 1.5, major × 1.0, minor × 0.5
4. For applicable rules only: weighted_score = sum(effective_weight × result) for all applicable rules
5. max_possible = sum(effective_weight) for all applicable rules
7. Check auto_fail_conditions — if any triggered, override final_score = 0
scoring_algorithm.not_applicable_handling: Exclude rule from both numerator and denominator entirely. Do not penalize or reward. Use NOT_APPLICABLE only when the check genuinely cannot apply (e.g., charge state rule for a MALDI-only COA).

auto_fail_conditions.description: Future-dated analysis — physically impossible; automatic evidence of fabrication
Localized pixelation in specific data fields — direct evidence of digital alteration
Lab has no record of vendor or batch — COA definitively not genuine
QR code or digital verification data does not match paper COA — tampered document
Identical COA documents across different peptide products — systematic fabrication
Zero impurity peaks combined with no purity value — no analytical basis for any quality claim

score_bands.label: VERIFIED
score_bands.description: COA passes all critical checks and the substantial majority of secondary checks. High confidence in document authenticity and product quality representation.
score_bands.typical_profile: Third-party lab, ISO 17025 accredited, digital verification passes, batch number confirmed, realistic purity decimals, natural chromatogram, dates consistent

score_bands.label: ACCEPTABLE
score_bands.description: COA passes all critical checks but has minor gaps, unverifiable elements, or missing supplementary data. Acceptable for standard RUO research purposes.
score_bands.action: Accept with notation of identified gaps
score_bands.typical_profile: Third-party lab verified, but chromatogram missing (common with Janoshik) OR accreditation not confirmed OR minor formatting issues — no critical failures

score_bands.label: REVIEW_REQUIRED
score_bands.description: COA has significant gaps, one or more major red flags, or multiple minor issues. Vendor should be contacted for clarification before proceeding.
score_bands.action: Request supplementary documentation and/or direct lab verification before use
score_bands.typical_profile: In-house COA with no independent verification, or third-party lab unverifiable, or COA age borderline, or multiple missing structural elements

score_bands.label: SUSPICIOUS
score_bands.description: COA has multiple major red flags or fails critical checks outside the auto-fail list. High risk of misrepresentation or document manipulation.
score_bands.action: Reject unless product is independently retested by a verified third-party lab before use
score_bands.typical_profile: Round purity values across catalog, missing MS data, unverifiable lab, old COA, no batch number match — multiple compounding issues

score_bands.label: REJECT
score_bands.description: COA fails critical checks, triggers auto-fail conditions, or shows direct evidence of fabrication. Product should not be used.
score_bands.action: Reject; consider reporting to community testing databases
score_bands.typical_profile: Auto-fail condition triggered, or: lab denies issuing document, community testing contradicts claims, localized pixelation, future-dated analysis

category_weight_distribution.description: Approximate contribution of each category to the total possible score, based on rule weights and severity multipliers in coa_rules.json
category_weight_distribution.forgery_indicators: ~4% net contribution (15 rules, predominantly critical/major — these rules are FAIL-oriented; passing them adds less than failing them subtracts)

confidence_modifiers.description: Adjustments applied after raw score calculation. Capped so final score remains 0–100.

bonuses.condition: Direct lab contact confirms COA authenticity (LAB-007 verified)
bonuses.notes: Strongest possible external confirmation; applies only if actively verified, not just that contact was possible

bonuses.condition: Digital verification key or QR code passes (XREF-007 verified)
bonuses.notes: Independent cryptographic or database confirmation of document authenticity

bonuses.condition: Community testing data consistent with COA claims (multiple independent sources)
bonuses.notes: Requires at least 2 independent third-party test results from separate buyers

penalties.condition: Community testing consistently contradicts COA claims (multiple independent sources)
penalties.notes: Requires at least 2 independent third-party test results showing substantially lower purity or wrong compound

penalties.condition: Vendor behavior is evasive or hostile when verification is attempted (FORG-011 pattern)
penalties.notes: Behavioral indicator — applies when vendor actively impedes verification attempts

penalties.condition: Pricing is 50%+ below verified market rate without explanation
penalties.notes: FORG-015 scoring supplement; applies as a soft penalty in combination with other red flags

not_applicable_examples.METH-009: MALDI-TOF method confirmed — charge state multiplicity rule N/A (MALDI shows singly-charged ions)
not_applicable_examples.NUM-009: Product is explicitly non-injectable (topical or in-vitro only) — endotoxin threshold N/A
not_applicable_examples.METH-011: Basic RUO COA without pharmaceutical-grade claims — heavy metals panel N/A
not_applicable_examples.STRUCT-012: Lab confirmed to operate under client confidentiality policy — client name absence N/A
not_applicable_examples.LAB-008: Lab confirmed to not offer digital verification system — absence of QR code N/A
not_applicable_examples.METH-003: C4 column justified for large hydrophobic peptide (>30 residues) — C18 rule N/A
not_applicable_examples.NUM-005: NPC not reported — NPC range check N/A (absence of NPC is not itself a red flag)
not_applicable_examples.METH-010: NPC not reported — NPC method check N/A

example_score_calculations.scenario: Ideal Janoshik COA — no embedded chromatogram, all other elements present and verified

rule_results.METH-006: NOT_APPLICABLE (Janoshik does not embed chromatogram; lab verified via verification key)

example_score_calculations.scenario: In-house COA with round purity numbers and no MS data
